title: 2015-2019 Batch Placements
content: 2015-2019 Batch Placements Placement Highlights-JUIT Solan B.Tech–2019 4.2 LPA Mean Salary 4.1 LPA Median Salary 10.0 LPA Highest Salary by Byjus 8.0 LPA 2nd Highest Salary by zscaler PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT Solan 2015-19 as on 25/July/2019 Branch Eligible Participating Students No. of Absolute Offers % of Absolute Offers No. of Total Offers % of Total Offers CSE 160 150 94% 229 143% ECE 65 65 100% 76 117% IT 22 21 95% 32 145% BT/BI 26 24 92% 27 104% CIVIL 46 19 41% 23 50% Total 319 279 87% 387 121% Key Recruiters: Click Labs Infosys TT Consultants Cogizant Kony Labs UniMrkt Coviam Technologies Kuliza Wep Digital Edoofa Kwench Wipro Ericsson Nineleaps Yamaha Motor Sol FICO NTT Data ZS Associates Gemalto Decision Point Zscaler Genpact Root Analysis Zycus Grappus RTDS Zyla Healthcare Hackwithinfi Sap labs IDS Infotech Hashdin SRM Contractors Eckovation HCL Stellarix Consultancy Extramarks India Lends The Smart Cube Collagedunia IndiaMart TresVista Ultratech Mountblue Bright Petroleum Growman Research Group Note:- A large number of students have opted for higher studies in India and abroad through GATE and other competitive examinations.
